TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit BasicHttpBinding extends System.ServiceModel.HttpBindingBase

Docs.summary: Represents a binding that a Windows Communication Foundation (WCF) service can use to configure and expose endpoints that are able to communicate with ASMX-based Web services and clients and other services that conform to the WS-I Basic Profile 1.1.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding> uses HTTP as the transport for sending SOAP 1.1 messages. A service can use this binding to expose endpoints that conform to WS-I BP 1.1, such as those that ASMX clients access. Similarly, a client can use the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding> to communicate with services exposing endpoints that conform to WS-I BP 1.1, such as ASMX Web services or Windows Communication Foundation (WCF) services configured with the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding>.
Security is turned off by default, but can be added setting the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode> to a value other than <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode.None> in the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding.%23ctor(System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode)> constructor. It uses a "Text" message encoding and UTF-8 text encoding by default.
## Examples The following example shows how to configure the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding> in an application configuration file.
The following example shows how to programmatically configure <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding>.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/service.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/vb/service.vb" id="Snippet1":::

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The default value of <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode> used is <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode.None>, which specifies that the SOAP message is not secured and the client is not authenticated.
## Examples :::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/service.cs" id="Snippet2"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/vb/service.vb" id="Snippet2":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(valuetype System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode securityMode) cil managed

Docs.param: The value of that specifies the type of security that is used with the SOAP message and for the client.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified type of security used by the binding.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The default value of <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode> used is <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode.None>, which specifies that the SOAP message is not secured and the client is not authenticated.
## Examples :::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/snippets.cs" id="Snippet3"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/vb/snippets.vb" id="Snippet3":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string configurationName) cil managed

Docs.param: The binding configuration name for the .
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a binding specified by its configuration name.

remarks.format:
## Examples This example initializes a new <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding> class with a binding specified by the configuration name `myBinding`. You must create a bindings section in the service's configuration file.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/snippets.cs" id="Snippet5"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/vb/snippets.vb" id="Snippet5":::
Then the name of the binding configuration is specified in the call to the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding> constructor.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/snippets.cs" id="Snippet4"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/vb/snippets.vb" id="Snippet4":::

Docs.exception: The binding with the configuration name was not found.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance class System.ServiceModel.Channels.IChannelFactory`1<!!TChannel> BuildChannelFactory<TChannel>(class System.ServiceModel.Channels.BindingParameterCollection parameters) cil managed
Public Overrides Function BuildChannelFactory(Of TChannel) (parameters As BindingParameterCollection) As IChannelFactory(Of TChannel)

Docs.typeparam: The type of channel the channel factory produces.
Docs.param: Specifies the requirements for the channel factory built.
Docs.summary: Builds the channel factory stack on the client that creates a specified type of channel and that satisfies the features specified by a collection of binding parameters.
Docs.returns: An of type that satisfies the features specified by the collection.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance class System.ServiceModel.Channels.BindingElementCollection CreateBindingElements() cil managed
Public Overrides Function CreateBindingElements () As BindingElementCollection

Docs.summary: Creates and returns an ordered collection of binding elements contained in the current binding.
Docs.returns: The that contains the ordered stack of binding elements described by the .

remarks.format:
## Remarks The order of the binding elements is important. It reflects the order in which the protocol and transport channels are constructed and stacked. This collection of binding elements is a new collection and can be modified and then used to create a <xref:System.ServiceModel.Channels.CustomBinding>.
## Examples The following example creates an ordered collection of the binding elements in the current binding.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/client.cs" id="Snippet26":::

MemberSignature.Value: member this.EnableHttpCookieContainer : bool with get, set
public: property bool EnableHttpCookieContainer { bool get(); void set(bool value); };

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("This property is obsolete. To enable Http CookieContainer, use the AllowCookies property instead.", false)]
[<System.Obsolete("This property is obsolete. To enable Http CookieContainer, use the AllowCookies property instead.", false)>]

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether HTTP cookie container is enabled.
Docs.value: if HTTP cookie container is enabled; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: member this.MessageEncoding : System.ServiceModel.WSMessageEncoding with get, set
public: property System::ServiceModel::WSMessageEncoding MessageEncoding { System::ServiceModel::WSMessageEncoding get(); void set(System::ServiceModel::WSMessageEncoding value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets whether MTOM or Text is used to encode SOAP messages.
Docs.value: The value of that indicates whether MTOM or Text/XML is used to encode SOAP messages. The default value is .

remarks.format:
## Examples The following example sets MessageEncoding to Text.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/client.cs" id="Snippet19":::
The value of this property can also be set in the configuration file.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Security : System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurity with get, set
public: property System::ServiceModel::BasicHttpSecurity ^ Security { System::ServiceModel::BasicHttpSecurity ^ get(); void set(System::ServiceModel::BasicHttpSecurity ^ value); };

Docs.summary: Gets the type of security used with this binding.
Docs.value: The that is used with this binding. The default value is .

remarks.format:
## Remarks By default, the SOAP message is not secured and the client is not authenticated. To use a non-default type of security, use the <xref:System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpBinding.%23ctor(System.ServiceModel.BasicHttpSecurityMode)> constructor.
## Examples The following example gets the `Security` property.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/VS_Snippets_CFX/s_uebasichttpbinding/cs/client.cs" id="Snippet23":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance bool ShouldSerializeEnableHttpCookieContainer() cil managed

Docs.summary: Indicates whether the http cookie container should enable the serialization.
Docs.returns: if the http cookie container should enable the serialization; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance bool ShouldSerializeSecurity() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns whether security settings should be serialized based upon whether serialization already occurs, for example at the message or transport level.
Docs.returns: if security should be serialized; otherwise, .
